keyFindings.description: Duplicate session guard runs after createSession() — functionally correct (idempotent), but cleaner if moved before
Missing test for workspace resolution failure path in cmdAdopt (CliError when --workspace not provided and registry returns null)
Missing test for path traversal validation in scanOcRegistry (entryDir with '..' should be skipped)
No warning when OC registry lookup is skipped due to explicit --workspace — original standalone process may remain running
